body: This PR replaces the unbounded ClimaTimeSteppers compat entry with "0.8.11, 0.9, 0.10". Turns out JuliaRegistrator won't allow us to use the unbounded compat entry introduced in #1793 (see [this comment](https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General/pull/160750#issuecomment-4939610700)).
title: Add upper bound to ClimaTimeSteppers compat
